creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port does not fetch correctly from github. Please have a look at
other ports that use github to see how it is done correctly. As a lot of
time has passed since you submitted the patch could you also have a look
at the newer releases 0.6.3 or 0.7.0?

Thanks!

-- 
Bernhard Froehlich
http://www.bluelife.at/
